title: swertia lutea
intro: Swertia lutea, also known as Lutea Swertia or Yellow Root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including the presence of swertiamarin and sweroside, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Swertia lutea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Swertia lutea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
